  • Uses of Dl4jProperties in com.ai.dl4j.config

    Methods in com.ai.dl4j.config with parameters of type Dl4jProperties
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Dl4jModelService
    Dl4jAutoConfiguration.dl4jModelService(Dl4jProperties properties, org.deeplearning4j.nn.multilayer.MultiLayerNetwork model)
    Provides the main service for interacting with the DL4J model.
    org.deeplearning4j.nn.multilayer.MultiLayerNetwork
    Dl4jAutoConfiguration.multiLayerNetwork(Dl4jProperties properties)
    Creates the DL4J MultiLayerNetwork based on configuration properties.

    Method
    Description
    static org.deeplearning4j.nn.multilayer.MultiLayerNetwork
    Dl4jModelFactory.build(Dl4jProperties props)
    Builds and initializes a MultiLayerNetwork from the provided configuration.
